title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A planned fight at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in a mass shooting, leaving two dead and several wounded.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on communities in North Carolina.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer science and extrusion technology within the region.

title: US Navy Returns to Charlotte for Community Engagement
summary: The US Navy is engaging in nearly 100 community events across Charlotte, marking their return after almost 20 years.
charlotte_impact: Strengthens ties between the military and the local community through various outreach programs.

title: Clash Over I-77 Toll Lanes Project Design and Impact
summary: Residents and Charlotte leaders are in conflict over the design and community impact of the I-77 South toll lanes project.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the challenges of balancing infrastructure development with community concerns and quality of life.

title: Northwest Charlotte Shooting Ruled Justified Homicide
summary: A shooting on Dundeen Street in Northwest Charlotte has been labeled a justified homicide, and no charges will be filed.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into the legal outcomes of violent incidents and the complexities of self-defense claims.

title: Southwest Charlotte Shooting Deemed Justified Homicide
summary: A shooting in Southwest Charlotte that resulted in one death and two injuries has been ruled a justified homicide.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the ongoing issues of violence and the legal system's response to incidents involving self-defense.

title: First Suspect Convicted in 2022 Hickory Shooting
summary: Jakeis Zameir Harris was sentenced to 20-25 years for the death of Khalil Rhynhart in a 2022 Hickory shooting.
charlotte_impact: Shows progress in resolving past criminal cases and delivering justice to victims and their families.

title: Man Charged with Murder and Rape in East Charlotte Death
summary: Thomaz Hamilton is charged with the murder and rape of Isabella Stroupe in East Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Addresses serious violent crimes and their impact on community safety and well-being.

title: Charlotte-Mecklenburg School Board Addresses Budget Gaps
summary: The Charlotte-Mecklenburg School Board is working to close budget gaps before the May 12 deadline, focusing on equitable resource distribution.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the challenges in funding education and ensuring fair resource allocation across schools.

title: Rain Expected Mid-Week
summary: A warm Tuesday is expected, with good chances of rain arriving by Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast, which is important for daily planning and awareness of potential weather impacts.

title: Suspect Arrested After Attempted Robbery and Police Chase
summary: Savon Poe was arrested after an attempted robbery and subsequent police pursuit, facing seven felony charges.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates law enforcement's response to criminal activity and the consequences for offenders.

title: Weather Alert: Severe Weather Possible Wednesday Night
summary: Charlotte faces a risk of heavy rain and severe weather from Wednesday night into Thursday.
charlotte_impact: Alerts residents to potential hazards and encourages preparedness for adverse weather conditions.

title: North Carolina Fire Chief Arrested on Drug Trafficking Charges
summary: William Stubbs, fire chief for the Morven Fire Department, was arrested on drug trafficking and explosives charges.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about public trust and the integrity of individuals in positions of authority.

title: Drone Crash Sparks Fire in Burke County Woods
summary: A crashed personal drone ignited a fire in Burke County woods, which was contained by firefighters.
charlotte_impact: Highlights potential risks associated with drone usage and the importance of responsible operation.

title: Scooter Rider Seriously Injured in South Charlotte Crash
summary: A scooter rider was seriously injured in a collision at Weddington Road and Plantation Road in South Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Draws attention to the safety risks for scooter riders and the need for caution on roadways.
